items.title: Social Security faces insolvency a year earlier than forecast, paying only 78% of benefits

items.title: Oracle’s stock has surged on AI hype. Now it has to deliver the earnings to match.

items.title: How exploding investor euphoria and leveraged ETFs turned one stock-market bull cautious
